name: Merab Dvalishvili
oneLiner: The modern bantamweight pace engine: relentless pressure, elite contender depth, and a title case built in one of the sport’s toughest divisions.
compareShortCase: Merab is the modern bantamweight pressure-and-longevity case: endless pace, elite control, a deep contender run, and a championship profile that reached a split rivalry with Yan.
compareCounter: Merab's argument is depth and pace. Even with the Yan series split, the first Yan win and his broader modern bantamweight schedule make his case stronger than a simple title-loss read suggests.
